response.justification: Bogdan has 20 years of broad software engineering experience and meets the tenure bar, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq. However, the role demands a Director-level individual contributor who can advise strategic customers and partners on AI adoption, shape cloud product futures, and operate as a recognized external AI thought leader — none of which are evidenced in this resume. His AI work is shallow and very recent, there is no advanced degree or deep ML/AI research background, cloud expertise is limited to consuming AWS CDK rather than architecting cloud platforms, and there is no record of executive-level advisory engagements or industry-wide influence at the scale this position requires.
strengths: 20+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, satisfying the minimum tenure requirement
Entrepreneurial track record (GISCollective founder, startup roles at WatchUp and RIDE Capital) demonstrates initiative and comfort operating in ambiguous, early-stage contexts
Recent hands-on AI infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq) shows active engagement with the current AI tooling landscape
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and late-arriving — only one current role mentions AI work, with no prior AI/ML research, published work, recognized AI products, or formal AI education to substantiate a 'Principal AI Strategy' designation
No evidence of the director-level advisory function the role requires — advising strategic enterprise customers, shaping cloud product roadmaps, or influencing external ecosystems at scale
Cloud experience is limited to consuming managed services (AWS CDK) rather than designing cloud platforms or infrastructure strategy, which is central to this position's remit
